targets.expr: avg(kube_pod_container_info{namespace="$namespace", pod=~'($deployment|$daemonset|$statefulset).+', image!='', container!='POD'}) by (image)
sum(kube_pod_info{namespace="$namespace", created_by_name=~'($deployment.+|$daemonset|$statefulset)', pod_ip=~".+"}) by (node)

sum(
    rate(container_cpu_cfs_throttled_periods_total{namespace="$namespace", pod=~'($deployment|$daemonset|$statefulset).+', image!=''}[1m])) by (pod)
    / sum(rate(container_cpu_cfs_periods_total{namespace="$namespace", pod=~'($deployment|$daemonset|$statefulset).+', image!=''}[1m])
) by (pod)
* on(pod) group_left(created_by_name) group(kube_pod_info{namespace="$namespace", created_by_name=~'($deployment.+|$daemonset|$statefulset)', pod_ip=~".+"}) by (created_by_name, pod)
kube_daemonset_status_number_ready{namespace="$namespace", daemonset="$daemonset"}
kube_daemonset_status_number_unavailable{namespace="$namespace", daemonset="$daemonset"}
kube_daemonset_status_number_misscheduled{env="$env", cluster="$cluster", daemonset="$daemonset"}
sum(kube_pod_container_status_last_terminated_reason{env="$env", cluster="$cluster", pod=~'($deployment|$daemonset|$statefulset).+'}) by (pod, container, reason)
kube_pod_container_status_restarts_total{pod=~'($deployment|$daemonset|$statefulset).+'}

topk(100, 
    sum(rate(container_cpu_usage_seconds_total{namespace="$namespace", pod=~"($deployment|$daemonset|$statefulset).+", container!=""}[$__rate_interval])) by (pod)
    / on(pod) sum(kube_pod_container_resource_limits{namespace="$namespace", pod=~'($deployment|$daemonset|$statefulset).+', resource='cpu', node=~".+"}) by (pod)    
)

topk(100, 
    sum(container_memory_working_set_bytes{namespace="$namespace", pod=~"($deployment|$daemonset|$statefulset).+", container!=""}) by (pod)
    / on(pod) sum(kube_pod_container_resource_limits{namespace="$namespace", pod=~'($deployment|$daemonset|$statefulset).+', resource='memory', unit='byte', node=~".+"}) by (pod)
)

avg_over_time(
max(
    rate(container_cpu_cfs_throttled_periods_total{namespace="$namespace", pod=~'($deployment|$daemonset|$statefulset).+', image!=''}[1m])
    / rate(container_cpu_cfs_periods_total{namespace="$namespace", pod=~'($deployment|$daemonset|$statefulset).+', image!=''}[1m])
    * on(pod) group_left(created_by_name) group(kube_pod_info{namespace="$namespace", created_by_name=~'($deployment.+|$daemonset|$statefulset)', pod_ip=~".+"}) by (image, pod)
) by (image)
[5m:])

avg_over_time(
max(
    rate(container_cpu_cfs_throttled_periods_total{namespace="$namespace", pod=~'($deployment|$daemonset|$statefulset).+', image!=''}[1m] offset ${cpu_offset})
    / rate(container_cpu_cfs_periods_total{namespace="$namespace", pod=~'($deployment|$daemonset|$statefulset).+', image!=''}[1m] offset ${cpu_offset})
    * on(pod) group_left(created_by_name) group(kube_pod_info{namespace="$namespace", created_by_name=~'($deployment.+|$daemonset|$statefulset)', pod_ip=~".+"} offset ${cpu_offset}) by (image, pod)
) by (image)
[5m:])

avg_over_time(
min(
    rate(container_cpu_cfs_throttled_periods_total{namespace="$namespace", pod=~'($deployment|$daemonset|$statefulset).+', image!=''}[1m])
    / rate(container_cpu_cfs_periods_total{namespace="$namespace", pod=~'($deployment|$daemonset|$statefulset).+', image!=''}[1m])
    * on(pod) group_left(created_by_name) group(kube_pod_info{namespace="$namespace", created_by_name=~'($deployment.+|$daemonset|$statefulset)', pod_ip=~".+"}) by (image, pod)
) by (image)
[5m:])

avg_over_time(
min(
    rate(container_cpu_cfs_throttled_periods_total{namespace="$namespace", pod=~'($deployment|$daemonset|$statefulset).+', image!='', container!='POD'}[1m] offset ${cpu_offset})
    / rate(container_cpu_cfs_periods_total{namespace="$namespace", pod=~'($deployment|$daemonset|$statefulset).+', image!='', container!='POD'}[1m] offset ${cpu_offset})
    * on(pod) group_left(created_by_name) group(kube_pod_info{namespace="$namespace", created_by_name=~'($deployment.+|$daemonset|$statefulset)', pod_ip=~".+"} offset ${cpu_offset}) by (image, pod)
) by (image)
[5m:])

avg_over_time(
avg(
    rate(container_cpu_cfs_throttled_periods_total{namespace="$namespace", pod=~'($deployment|$daemonset|$statefulset).+', image!=''}[1m])
    / rate(container_cpu_cfs_periods_total{namespace="$namespace", pod=~'($deployment|$daemonset|$statefulset).+', image!=''}[1m])
    * on(pod) group_left(created_by_name) group(kube_pod_info{namespace="$namespace", created_by_name=~'($deployment.+|$daemonset|$statefulset)', pod_ip=~".+"}) by (image, pod)
) by (image)
[5m:])

avg_over_time(
avg(
    rate(container_cpu_cfs_throttled_periods_total{namespace="$namespace", pod=~'($deployment|$daemonset|$statefulset).+', image!=''}[1m] offset ${cpu_offset})
    / rate(container_cpu_cfs_periods_total{namespace="$namespace", pod=~'($deployment|$daemonset|$statefulset).+', image!=''}[1m] offset ${cpu_offset})
    * on(pod) group_left(created_by_name) group(kube_pod_info{namespace="$namespace", created_by_name=~'($deployment.+|$daemonset|$statefulset)', pod_ip=~".+"} offset ${cpu_offset}) by (image, pod)
) by (image)
[5m:])
